sample_review_signals:
Подышать 10 минут минимум, лучше 20. После этого начнет раскрываться черная смородина, резиново-дымные нотки, приторная сладость сахарной ваты и звёздная пыль. И вот вроде глубокое, полнотелое, нетривиальное на вкус и даже созвучное интригующему названию, но мне почему-то не зашло. 

4 поставлю, заслужило, но второй раз не возьму. Разочарован своим разочарованием, если можно так сказать.

P.S. Девочкам понравится.

3,35⭐ это пожалуй максимум! Да, с учётом цены многие ставят более высокие оценки, но это не правильно. Песня из 3х блатных аккордов, вот такая ассоция. Просто, но заходит не плохо. Хороший винный материал, я бы так описал. Нет ничего выраженного и Астрального, но и сильно отталкивающего тоже. 🤷‍♂️
Bit of bite in the end / after a few glasses .. not as smooth as 4stars would make you think

sample_review_signals: The usual hyper value of the worst Italian critics! This is a Osteria Wine !

Tuscan 100% Merlot. Ruby colour. M intensity nose of berry fruits and stewed plums, hint of red fruits and vanilla. Palete delivers much more, juicy berry medley, cranberry, hints of herbaceous notes. Tannins quite nicely integrated already, combining with 14% ABV for a solid m++ finish. 4.3* based on vfm and potential to improve 🍷👏👏
Fully body merlot with undertone of cherry taste!!

sample_review_signals: Un exquisito logro..
Grand Tour da Grand Cru no Museu do Vinho.

Excellent and to my taste one of the best Argentine wines. Made with 85% Malbec and 15% Cabernet Sauvignon from Cafayate, Salta. Aged for 15 months in new French oak barrels. Aromas of blackberry, plum, blueberry, plum, chocolate, oak, earth, spices and vanilla. On the palate medium + body, structured,well balanced, good complexity and acidity. Rounded tannins. Long and seductive finish. Highly recommended!!!

sample_review_signals: Promo foire aux vins carrefour Belgique 2+1 gratuit ! La bouteille revient alors à 6,55€ excellent rapport qualité prix

Rapport qualité prix exceptionnel, le nez cependant est discret, marqué par un compoté de fruits noirs, la bouche est envahissante , boisé, à juste pour point, un délice sur des plats en sauce et de la viande rouge. On oubliera pas les fromages, camembert, Livarot, fromages puissants etc, impératif d'avoir dans sa cave à moins de dix €....sensationnel !
A red wine Katie is willing to drink!

sample_review_signals:
Very nice wine for a very fair rate. This differs from most Italians I've tried, specifically in that it's one of the sweetest I've encountered. It's a lot like biting into a perfectly ripe plum. Cherry flavor is also notable. 

Great flavors, great nose, medium structure, and an overall nice experience
Great value , rare example of Tuscan Red I enjoyed
Fruity with rich tannins and fairly long finish. Due to the price in deserves 4 stars at least ..!

sample_review_signals: 3.7 very smooth and fruity but lacks some depth.

Hard to decide whether to rate this one 4.0 or 4.5. Ultimately settled on 4.5, since at merely 8 euros she (he??) definitely merits an opkontje (pardon my Dutch) over the 4.0 crowd that isn’t really all that exciting. Still, there are a significant number of 4.5 members (obviously also at the 8/10 euro price point, I mean) that are better than this one, and whose tastes are simply deeper and richer. So 4.25 would have been the most appropriate score and I’m pleased to help this Coppiere get there averagely!
Fantastic drop at £11. Bold nose, followed by a palate filling mix of dark fruit, smoke and a touch of pepper. Fully rounded tannins and very smooth. In short, eminently drinkable!

sample_review_signals: Excelente vinho da famosa Casa Ferreirinha com presença de frutas vermelhas (nenhuma relação com figos, mas sim ameixa e amoras) e taninos macios.
